aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to missing structured data and conversational content, but there is potential for improvement.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and answers.
Add LocalBusiness schema to provide detailed business information.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and a high rating, but Q&A engagement is lacking.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section.
Missing regular posts to engage with potential customers.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing on the website but present on GBP.
action_items: Add the complete address to the website footer.
Verify and update NAP details across all online directories.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes it difficult for AI to understand and recommend the business.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and detailed service explanations.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating detailed HowTo guides and showcasing certifications to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the go-to HVAC expert.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Your website lacks structured data and conversational content, making it less visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to make your business stand out to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to boost your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search.
